rationale: Both candidates independently surfaced the exact latent gap (surviving get_cache_scale call in hunyuan_image3_transformer.py), so gap_hit is true for both, and both ground their findings in concrete file/line evidence. Y has notably higher recall: it explicitly reproduces the ground-truth reviewer's nuance about qwen2_old's getattr guard being a safe cleanup rather than a regression, and frames the DiT-transformer omission with the same 'coordinates with #4808/incomplete sweep' angle the human reviewer raised, whereas X only implicitly touches correctness validation and misses the getattr/regression-test nuances entirely. X compensates with a couple of legitimate extra findings (dead `is not None` mapper checks) but oversells the missed call-site as a hard 'blocker'/REQUEST CHANGES when the actual PR merged and reviewers approved it, slightly misjudging severity relative to ground truth. Both are highly actionable with precise file/line pointers and concrete fixes.
